auth.name: Full Name

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

onboarding.selectCards: Tell us about your tastes by selecting at least 4 experience cards.
onboarding.chooseExperiencesDesc: Select at least {{min}} cards for personalized routes and recommendations
onboarding.insufficientSelectionDesc: Please select at least {{min}} experience cards. Currently {{count}} cards selected.
onboarding.saveSuccessMessage: Your experience preferences have been saved. You will now see personalized routes and recommendations!
onboarding.skipConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to skip?
onboarding.skipConfirmMessage: If you continue without selecting experience cards, you will not receive personalized recommendations. You can select them later in settings.

taste_dna.title: Travel Preferences
taste_dna.description: These preferences determine how your routes are generated. You can change them at any time.
taste_dna.detourToleranceDesc: How open are you to detours?
taste_dna.budgetPreferenceDesc: What price range do you prefer?
taste_dna.groupTypeDesc: Who do you usually travel with?
taste_dna.stopIntensityDesc: How often do you want to stop?
taste_dna.editWeightsDesc: Adjust priority of selected experience cards
taste_dna.unsavedChangesDesc: Changes not saved. Are you sure you want to exit?
